hero.subtitle: Guesthouse — Restaurant
hero.description: Discover an oasis of peace and luxury in the heart of Žitný ostrov. Villa Potoň combines elegance with nature for an unforgettable experience.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.description: We are a modern pension with restaurant, located in Horná Potôň, 35km from Bratislava, 10km from Dunajská Streda. Our goal is to provide quality services so you will leave satisfied and happy.

restaurant.title: Restaurant & Bar
restaurant.description: Gourmet experiences with local ingredients and a carefully curated wine list.

spa.title: Wellness & Spa
spa.description: Relax in our wellness center with sauna, hot tub, and massage treatments.

concierge.title: Concierge Services
concierge.description: Personal approach to every guest with individual stay planning.

dining.title: Private Dining
dining.description: Exclusive gastronomic experiences in the privacy of your apartment.

transfer.title: Transfer Services
transfer.description: Comfortable transfers from airports or train stations directly to us.

experiences.title: Experience Packages
experiences.description: Specially crafted programs for couples, families, and corporate teams.

quote.text: "A place where time slows down and every moment becomes a memory."
quote.author: — Villa Potoň

activities.title: Where Every Day is Designed for You
activities.subtitle: Discover a wide range of activities and experiences

events.title: Host Your Banquet, Wedding or Celebration
events.description: Villa Potoň is the ideal venue for your wedding, corporate event, or family celebration. We offer complete service from planning to execution.

reservation.title: Book Your Stay
reservation.description: Treat yourself to an unforgettable stay at Villa Potoň. Contact us for a personalized offer.

footer.address: Villa Potoň, Potoň, Žitný ostrov, Slovakia
